headline: 2 S&P 500 Stocks to Keep an Eye On and 1 We Brush Off
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.

headline: Why Is Lululemon (LULU) Down 1.6% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Lululemon (LULU) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Telsey Advisory Keeps a Market Perform Rating on lululemon athletica inc. (LULU)
summary: lululemon athletica inc. (NASDAQ:LULU) is one of the 15 Best Apparel Stocks to Buy in 2026. On March 18, 2026, Telsey Advisory analyst Dana Telsey decreased lululemon athletica inc. (NASDAQ:LULU)’s price objective to $175 from $215 while keeping a Market Perform rating. The firm noted a weaker Q1 forecast and a high-end annual guide that […]
